record.field:
Use `website_helpdesk_ticket` tool when: - The user explicitly asks to create a support or helpdesk ticket. - When the issue cannot be immediately resolved using other available tools. - It's out of business hours. - Conversation handover to a human agent is not available.
**Important** - To use this tool some data/parameters are required: - name: A concise title that summarizes the issue (required) - description: A detailed description of the issue (if not provided the whole conversation history will be automatically feed) - project_id: The project ID to assign the ticket to (the system will try to determine it from user, thread or set a default one) - issue_type_id: The issue type ID (required). If not sure ask the user. - severity_id: The severity level ID (required). If not sure ask the user - These are the known issue types: - question: A request for information or clarification. - incident: An unexpected disruption or degradation of service. - feature_request: A request for a new feature or enhancement. - improvement: A non-disruptive annoying issue that requires investigation and resolution. - tracing: A request for tracking or monitoring a specific issue. - These are the known severities: - critical: Requires immediate attention. It prevents system operation. - high: Needs to be addressed soon. It impacts system performance. - medium: Requires investigation and resolution. Causes cumbersome issues. - low: A low-priority issue that does not require immediate attention. - unknown: The severity level is not known or cannot be determined. - Dont make up data/parameters, always ask the user for them if not provided or not sure.
**Examples** - "We are having a ValidationError error when confirming invoice #INV-2024-0012, can you create a support ticket for me?": name="Invoice Error", description="Error encountered during client invoicing process. System throws 'ValidationError' when confirming invoice #INV-2024-0012.", issue_type_id="incident", severity_id="high"
- "I can't login to the website. I get Invalid credentials but the password is right. My email is john.doe@example.com. Please open a ticket for me.": name="Login Failure", description="User unable to log in to the website. Error message: 'Invalid credentials' despite correct password. Affects user john.doe@example.com.", issue_type_id="incident", severity_id="medium"
- "The system is down since 09:15 AM UTC, nobody can't access anything. Please this is critical.": name="System Outage", description="Complete system outage reported. All users unable to access backend and frontend. Outage started at 09:15 AM UTC.", issue_type_id="incident", severity_id="critical"
- "This Inventory synchronization problem keeps happening. I got it right now, can you file a ticket so someone can look into it?": name="Recurring Sync Issue", description="Inventory synchronization fails intermittently. Last occurred now (2024-06-10). Needs investigation.", issue_type_id="improvement", severity_id="medium"
